creator: dokas@shoggoth.oitsec.umn.edu
text:
shoggoth# cd x11/ruby-gnome2
  shoggoth# make patch
  ===>  Extracting for ruby18-gnome2-0.15.0.20061130

  fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ruby/ruby-gnome2-all-0.15.0.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 1317766, actual 1273856
  => Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this

  *** Error code 1
